title: Alloy Forgery: BetterX Compat
description: Adds Better End & Nether recipes to Alloy Forgery & Mythic Metals.
body: ## Overview This data pack simply integrate recipes from BetterX (End & Nether) with Alloy Forgery. - Charcoal block count as an alloy forge fuel (same as coal block) - Nether gold ores can now be alloy forged - Raw ores like Cincinnasite or Thallasium's output can be increased with an alloy forge - Alloys can now be actually smelted in the end alloy smelter The data pack will still function even if one of the BetterX mods isn't present. ### Installing Drop the data pack file into the `datapacks` folder inside your world.
